# TabletopGames Ark Nova Snapshot

This directory contains a source snapshot from:

- Repository: `https://github.com/jbargu/TabletopGames`
- License: MIT
- Snapshot commit: `19524fcd6bdcfd0855fbd055d6b17711223f21d4`
- Snapshot date: `2026-03-04`

Included paths from upstream:

- `src/main/java/games/arknova`
- `src/test/java/games/arknova`
- `data/arknova`
- `LICENSE`

Notes:

- This upstream Ark Nova implementation is not complete yet (contains multiple `TODO` sections).
- We keep it as an integration baseline/reference engine and for parity checks while implementing the fully correct base-game rules in this repository.
